task_completion.description: Navigate to the Report Schedules section in TimeTrex
task_completion.visual_evidence: The TimeTrex interface is visible, showing the 'Report Schedules' list or creation screen.

task_completion.description: Set the schedule name to 'Weekly Overtime Review'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text input field for the schedule name contains exactly 'Weekly Overtime Review'.
A dropdown or selection field for the report type shows 'Timesheet Summary' as the selected option.
An email input field or recipient list contains 'supervisor@greenleafwellness.com'.

task_completion.description: Set the schedule frequency to Weekly
task_completion.visual_evidence: A frequency dropdown or setting shows 'Weekly' as the selected interval.

task_completion.description: Ensure the schedule status is Active
task_completion.visual_evidence: A status toggle, checkbox, or dropdown indicates that the schedule is 'Active'.
A success message indicating the schedule was saved, or the 'Weekly Overtime Review' schedule is visible as an entry in the list of saved report schedules.

integrity.description: The agent used the TimeTrex web interface to create the schedule
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying the TimeTrex application, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent entered information into actual application fields
integrity.visual_evidence: The data (name, email, report type) is entered into the proper form fields within the TimeTrex UI, not just typed into a text editor or search bar.

integrity.description: The final result appears to be a genuine application state
integrity.visual_evidence: The saved schedule list or success screen looks like a standard TimeTrex interface without signs of browser developer tools being used to alter the page text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Schedule Name: 'Weekly Overtime Review'. Expected Email: 'supervisor@greenleafwellness.com'. Expected Report: 'Timesheet Summary'. Expected Frequency: 'Weekly'. Expected Status: 'Active'.
